article_meta.title: — News —'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S

transcript.content:
You are a news summarization assistant. Summarize the following article and extract its key facts. Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no prose, no markdown fences:
{
  "summary": "string (150-200 words)",
  "key_facts": ["string","string","string","string","string"],
  "sources_represented": ["string"]
}
Rules:
- summary must be 150-200 words
- key_facts must contain EXACTLY 5 items
- sources_represented must list every distinct perspective included

Summarize this article:

---
HEADLINE: — News —'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S
SOURCE: Morning Wire

ARTICLE:

— News —'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S. Will 'Rescue' Iranians If Regime Opens Fire On ProtestersThe Islamic Republic has been rocked by demonstrations over its collapsing economy. By Leif Le Mahieu•Jan 2, 2026 DailyWire.com•FacebookXMailCredit: Photo by Jim WATSON / AFP via Getty Images. President Donald Trump said that the United States would come to the "rescue" if Iranian forces began shooting protesters, as demonstrations against the regime continued for a sixth consecutive day. Sparked by economic unrest, protests first broke out last weekend in Tehran with groups chanting "death to the dictator" and "freedom." Seven people, including protesters and government forces, have been killed so far, according to reports. "If Iran shots [sic] and violently kills peaceful protesters, which is their custom, the United States of America will come to their rescue," Trump posted on Truth Social early Friday morning. "We are locked and loaded and ready to go. Thank you for your attention to this matter!"Trump's warning comes as he has continued to take an aggressive approach to Iran, saying earlier this week that he would support more Israeli military strikes on the country if Tehran continues to develop ballistic missiles or pursue nuclear capabilities.In response to Trump's post, the secretary of Iran's Supreme National Security Council said any intervention by America would exacerbate instability in the area while accusing the United States and Israel of encouraging the disorder. "With the statements by Israeli officials and Donald Trump, what has been going on behind the scenes is now clear. We distinguish between the stance of the protesting shopkeepers and the actions of disruptive actors, and Trump should know that U.S. interference in this internal matter would mean destabilizing the entire region and destroying America's interests," he posted on X. "The American people should know — Trump started this adventurism. They should be mindful of their soldiers' safety."Christmas Sale – Get 40% off New DailyWire+ Annual MembershipsMuch of the violence has occurred in Western Iran, where a local official promised that protesters would be treated "decisively and without leniency," Reuters reported. Dozens of protesters, including women and children, have been arrested. On Thursday, Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said the protests were the result of the government's failure to address skyrocketing inflation and widespread economic anxiety. "We are to blame… Do not look for America or anyone else to blame. We must serve properly so that people are satisfied with us…. It is us who have to find a solution to these problems," he said, Reuters reported. Iran's currency has reportedly dropped to 1.42 million to the dollar, a loss of more than 56% over six months, fueling soaring inflation and driving food prices up 72% from last year.Create a free account to join the conversation!Start CommentingAlready have an account?Log inGot a tip worth investigating?Your information could be the missing piece to an important story. Submit your tip today and make a difference.Submit TipThe Daily Wire > Read > 'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S. Will 'Rescue' Iranians If Regime Opens Fire On Protesters
---

{
  "summary": "Former President Donald Trump issued a warning that the United States would intervene if Iranian authorities use lethal force against ongoing anti-government protesters. The protests, now in their sixth day, began in response to Iran's deteriorating economy and rapid inflation, with demonstrators calling for freedom and an end to the current regime. At least seven people have died amid clashes between protesters and security forces, and dozens—including women and children—have been detained. Trump, through a post on Truth Social, declared that America is 'locked and loaded' to 'rescue' Iranians facing violent crackdowns. Iranian leaders, notably from the Supreme National Security Council, accused the U.S. and Israel of instigating disorder, warning that foreign intervention would worsen instability and threaten American interests in the region. Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian acknowledged domestic government failures as the cause of the unrest, citing massive inflation, currency collapse, and surging food prices. Authorities vowed to respond to the protests with decisive action, with Western Iran experiencing pronounced violence and the regime promising no leniency for those detained.",
  "key_facts": [
    "Donald Trump warned the U.S. would intervene if Iranian forces kill peaceful protesters.",
    "Protests in Iran over economic collapse have entered their sixth consecutive day.",
    "At least seven deaths and dozens of arrests, including women and children, have been reported.",
    "Iranian officials blame the U.S. and Israel for fomenting the unrest, while warning against foreign interference.",
    "Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian admitted government failures causing the protests, with inflation and currency crisis escalating."
  ],
  "sources_represented": [
    "Donald Trump/U.S. perspective",
    "Iranian government and security officials",
    "Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian",
    "Reuters"
  ]
}

parsed_output.summary: Former President Donald Trump issued a warning that the United States would intervene if Iranian authorities use lethal force against ongoing anti-government protesters. The protests, now in their sixth day, began in response to Iran's deteriorating economy and rapid inflation, with demonstrators calling for freedom and an end to the current regime. At least seven people have died amid clashes between protesters and security forces, and dozens—including women and children—have been detained. Trump, through a post on Truth Social, declared that America is 'locked and loaded' to 'rescue' Iranians facing violent crackdowns. Iranian leaders, notably from the Supreme National Security Council, accused the U.S. and Israel of instigating disorder, warning that foreign intervention would worsen instability and threaten American interests in the region. Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian acknowledged domestic government failures as the cause of the unrest, citing massive inflation, currency collapse, and surging food prices. Authorities vowed to respond to the protests with decisive action, with Western Iran experiencing pronounced violence and the regime promising no leniency for those detained.
key_facts: Donald Trump warned the U.S. would intervene if Iranian forces kill peaceful protesters.
Protests in Iran over economic collapse have entered their sixth consecutive day.
At least seven deaths and dozens of arrests, including women and children, have been reported.
Iranian officials blame the U.S. and Israel for fomenting the unrest, while warning against foreign interference.
Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian admitted government failures causing the protests, with inflation and currency crisis escalating.
